description: Improve the shopping-list empty state in meal-planner so users are guided to generate a meal plan before returning to the shopping list.
acceptance_criteria: The empty shopping-list state explains that shopping items depend on a generated meal plan.
The empty state includes a clear call to action that routes users toward meal-plan generation.
The change stays within existing brownfield constraints and avoids protected paths.
Repo-native validation commands can be attached as evaluation evidence.
constraints: Limit the change to existing frontend routes and shared UI components in meal-planner.
Do not modify protected paths such as .github, .claude, .copilot, .squad, meal_planner.db, or target.
Preserve the existing Rust backend and Cargo-managed workflows.
